subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been illumined by the lights of the Divine Throne and hath attained, in the Most Great Prison, unto the gaze of the Ancient King. God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوبت بانوار عرش فائز و در سجن اعظم بلحاظ مالک قدم مشرف گشت انشاء الله در
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @belief and denial
